tiers.title: High-Speed Lambda Comparators & PriorityQueues
tiers.summary: Multi-layer custom comparators and multi-dimensional sort on 1e6-element streams under tight time/memory budgets.

tiers.title: Collections Framework Internals
tiers.summary: HashMap bucket collisions, treeification (linked nodes → red-black trees), and load-factor resize cost tracking.

tiers.title: Concurrency & Project Loom
tiers.summary: Virtual threads, ExecutorService, CountDownLatch, Semaphore, thread-safe pools, and deadlock / race / safety stress tests.

tiers.title: JVM Low-Level Execution & GC Tuning
tiers.summary: G1 vs ZGC behavior via runtime flags, heap vs stack allocation trackers, and JIT warm-up profiling.
